hibernate-mapping.query: Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and comp.SourceCompanyId =:sourceCompanyId and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd =:txnState

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and comp.SourceCompanyId =:sourceCompanyId and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd =:txnState and finTxn.SettlementDate between :fromDate and :toDate

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and comp.SourceCompanyId =:sourceCompanyId and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd !=:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd =:txnState and (finTxn.CreditBankAccount =:bankAccount or finTxn.DebitBankAccount =:bankAccount)

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and comp.SourceCompanyId =:sourceCompanyId and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.DebitBankAccount =:bankAccount and finTxn.SettlementDate >=:fromDate order by finTxn.SettlementDate desc

Select payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate, sum(finTxn.FinancialTransactionAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.PaycheckSplit as payCheckSplit inner join payCheckSplit.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company.Id =:companyId and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate >=:fromDate and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:toDate and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and payCheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = payCheckSplit.Company group by payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate

Select payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate, sum(finTxn.FinancialTransactionAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.BillPaymentSplit as billPaymentSplit inner join billPaymentSplit.BillPayment as billPayment inner join billPayment.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company.Id =:companyId and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate >=:fromDate and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:toDate and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState group by payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate

Select payCheck.DDEmployee.Id, payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate, sum(finTxn.FinancialTransactionAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.PaycheckSplit as payCheckSplit inner join payCheckSplit.Paycheck as payCheck inner join payCheck.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company.Id =:companyId and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate >=:fromDate and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:toDate and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and payCheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = payCheckSplit.Company group by payCheck.DDEmployee.Id, payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate

Select billPayment.Payee.Id, payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate, sum(finTxn.FinancialTransactionAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.BillPaymentSplit as billPaymentSplit inner join billPaymentSplit.BillPayment as billPayment inner join billPayment.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company.Id =:companyId and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate >=:fromDate and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:toDate and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState group by billPayment.Payee.Id, payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate

Select finTxn.CreditBankAccount.RoutingNumber, finTxn.CreditBankAccount.AccountNumberEnc, payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate, sum(finTxn.FinancialTransactionAmount) from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company.Id=:companyId and finTxn.CreditBankAccountType =:creditBankAccountType and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate >=:fromDate and payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate <=:toDate and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState group by finTxn.CreditBankAccount.RoutingNumber, finTxn.CreditBankAccount.AccountNumberEnc, payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.Company=:company and (finTxn.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId or :sourcePayrollRunId is null) and (finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd= :txnTypeCd) and (finTxn.SettlementDate>=:fromDate or coalesce(:fromDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.SettlementDate<=:toDate or coalesce(:toDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Paycheck.DDEmployee= :employee or :employee is null) and ((finTxn.CreditBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct or finTxn.DebitBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct) or :employeeBnkAct is null) and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company order by finTxn.SettlementDate,TempId desc

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.Company=:company and (finTxn.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId or :sourcePayrollRunId is null) and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionCategory = :transactionCategory and (finTxn.SettlementDate>=:fromDate or coalesce(:fromDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.SettlementDate<=:toDate or coalesce(:toDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Paycheck.DDEmployee= :employee or :employee is null) and ((finTxn.CreditBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct or finTxn.DebitBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct) or :employeeBnkAct is null) and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company order by finTxn.SettlementDate,TempId desc

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.Company=:company and (finTxn.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId or :sourcePayrollRunId is null) and (finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd= :txnTypeCd or :txnTypeCd is null) and (finTxn.SettlementDate>=:fromDate or coalesce(:fromDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.SettlementDate<=:toDate or coalesce(:toDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd = :txnStateCd or :txnStateCd is null) and (finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Paycheck.DDEmployee= :employee or :employee is null) and ((finTxn.CreditBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct or finTxn.DebitBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct) or :employeeBnkAct is null) and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company = finTxn.Company and finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Paycheck.Company = finTxn.PaycheckSplit.Company order by finTxn.SettlementDate,TempId desc

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.Company=:company and (finTxn.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId or :sourcePayrollRunId is null) and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionCategory = :transactionCategory and (finTxn.SettlementDate>=:fromDate or coalesce(:fromDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.SettlementDate<=:toDate or coalesce(:toDate, null) is null) order by finTxn.SettlementDate,TempId desc

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.Company=:company and finTxn.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId and finTxn.TransactionType.AssociationType != :excludeTransactionAssociation and finTxn.TransactionType.FeeInd = :feeIndicator

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.Company=:company and (finTxn.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId or :sourcePayrollRunId is null) and (finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd= :txnTypeCd or :txnTypeCd is null) and (finTxn.SettlementDate>=:fromDate or coalesce(:fromDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.SettlementDate<=:toDate or coalesce(:toDate, null) is null) and (finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd = :txnStateCd or :txnStateCd is null) and ((finTxn.CreditBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct or finTxn.DebitBankAccount=:employeeBnkAct) or :employeeBnkAct is null) and ((finTxn.CreditBankAccount=:companyBnkAct or finTxn.DebitBankAccount=:companyBnkAct) or :companyBnkAct is null) order by finTxn.SettlementDate,TempId desc

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.PayrollRun as payrollRun where payrollRun.Company=:company and payrollRun.PaycheckDate=:depositDate and finTxn.CreditBankAccountType=:bankAccountType and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd=:txType and finTxn.PaycheckSplit is not null and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd!=:txState order by finTxn.SettlementDate

Select distinct finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransactionState as finTxnState, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as postingRule where payrollRun.Company = :company and (payrollRun.SourcePayRunId = :sourcePayrollRunId or :sourcePayrollRunId is null) and finTxn.PayrollRun.Id = payrollRun.Id and finTxnState.FinancialTransaction.Id = finTxn.Id and finTxnState.TransactionStateEffectiveDate >= FN_DATE_ADD(finTxn.CreatedDate, -2 , 'day') and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd=postingRule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and finTxnState.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd=postingRule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd and (postingRule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode or :ledgerAccountCode is null) order by finTxn.SettlementDate

Select distinct finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransactionState as finTxnState, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as postingRule where finTxn.Company = :company and finTxnState.FinancialTransaction.Id = finTxn.Id and finTxnState.TransactionStateEffectiveDate >= FN_DATE_ADD(finTxn.CreatedDate, -2 , 'day') and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd=postingRule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and finTxnState.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd=postingRule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd and (postingRule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode or :ledgerAccountCode is null) order by finTxn.SettlementDate

Select finTxn, postingRule.CreditDebitInd, finTxnState from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransactionState as finTxnState, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as postingRule where finTxn.Company = :company and finTxnState.FinancialTransaction.Id = finTxn.Id and finTxnState.TransactionStateEffectiveDate >= FN_DATE_ADD(finTxn.CreatedDate, -2 , 'day') and finTxn.PayrollRun.SourcePayRunId=:sourcePayrollRunId and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd=postingRule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and finTxnState.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd=postingRule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd and postingRule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode order by finTxn.SettlementDate

Select finTxn, postingRule.CreditDebitInd, finTxnState from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransactionState as finTxnState, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PostingRule as postingRule where finTxn.Company = :company and finTxnState.FinancialTransaction.Id = finTxn.Id and finTxnState.TransactionStateEffectiveDate >= FN_DATE_ADD(finTxn.CreatedDate, -2 , 'day') and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd=postingRule.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd and finTxnState.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd=postingRule.TransactionState.TransactionStateCd and postingRule.LedgerAccount.LedgerAccountCd = :ledgerAccountCode order by finTxn.SettlementDate

Select finTxn.Id, comp.Id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState=:txnState and finTxn.SettlementTypeCd=:settlementType and finTxn.SettlementDate between :lowerDateBound and :upperDateBound order by comp.Id, finTxn.SettlementDate desc

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTx where finTxn.Company=:company and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd !=:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd =:txnState and finTxn.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id=mmTx.Id and mmTx.InitiationDate >= :processingDate and (finTxn.CreditBankAccountType =:bankAccountOwnerType or finTxn.DebitBankAccountType =:bankAccountOwnerType)

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.MoneyMovementTransaction as mmTx where finTxn.Company=:company and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd !=:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd =:txnState and finTxn.MoneyMovementTransaction.Id=mmTx.Id and mmTx.InitiationDate > :processingDate and (finTxn.CreditBankAccountType =:bankAccountOwnerType or finTxn.DebitBankAccountType =:bankAccountOwnerType)

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.PayrollRun=:payrollRun and finTxn.TransactionType.AssociationType=:transactionAssociationType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState=:transactionState order by finTxn.SettlementDate

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction finTxn where finTxn.PayrollRun=:payrollRun and finTxn.Company=:company and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd in (:transactionTypeList) and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd in (:transactionStateList) and not exists ( from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction reissuedTxn where reissuedTxn = finTxn.OriginalTransaction and reissuedTxn.PayrollRun=:payrollRun and reissuedTxn.Company=:company)

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where finTxn.PayrollRun=:payrollRun and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd !=:txnState

Select FT1.Id, FT1.Company.Id From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as FT1 WHERE FT1.MoneyMovementTransaction.OffloadBatch = :pOffloadBatch AND FT1.CurrentTransactionState = 'Executed' AND FT1.TransactionType.FeeInd = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT OSC2.SKU FROM com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.OfferingServiceCharge OSC2 WHERE OSC2.SKU = FT1.Sku AND OSC2.SkuType = 'NonPayroll') AND FT1.MoneyMovementTransaction.Company = FT1.Company ORDER BY FT1.Company

Select FT1.Id, FT1.PayrollRun.Id, FT1.Company.Id From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as FT1 WHERE FT1.MoneyMovementTransaction.OffloadBatch = :pOffloadBatch AND FT1.CurrentTransactionState = 'Executed' AND FT1.PayrollRun.PayrollRunType = 'BillPayment' AND FT1.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd = 'EmployeeDdCredit' AND FT1.MoneyMovementTransaction.Company = FT1.Company ORDER BY FT1.Company

Select finTxn from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn inner join finTxn.Company as comp where comp.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and comp.SourceCompanyId =:sourceCompanyId and finTxn.TransactionType.TransactionTypeCd =:txnType and finTxn.DebitBankAccount =:bankAccount and finTxn.SettlementDate <=:processingDate and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState.TransactionStateCd =:txnState order by finTxn.SettlementDate desc

Select distinct ft, comp.SourceCompanyId,ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as ft where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and ft.Company=comp and ft.TransactionType.TransactionCategory = :transactionCatergoryCd and ( ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.ManualPaymentStatus = :manualPaymentStatusCd1 or ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.ManualPaymentStatus = :manualPaymentStatusCd2 or ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.TaxPaymentStatus = :taxPaymentStatusCd ) and ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt and ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.Company = ft.Company order by comp.SourceCompanyId, ft.Law.LawId, ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate

Select distinct ft , ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyService as cs, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as comp, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as ft where comp.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and cs.Service.ServiceCd = :serviceCd and cs.Company=comp and ft.Company=comp and comp.Id =:companyId and ft.TransactionType.TransactionCategory = :transactionCatergoryCd and ( ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.ManualPaymentStatus = :manualPaymentStatusCd1 or ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.ManualPaymentStatus = :manualPaymentStatusCd2 or ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.TaxPaymentStatus = :taxPaymentStatusCd ) and ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate >= :payChkFromDt and ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate < :payChkToDt and ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.Company = ft.Company order by ft.Law, ft.PayrollRun.PaycheckDate
